title: Legal means that can be used to protect copyright
author: Mubariz Yolchiyev
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Copyright is the sum of personal non-property (moral) and property (material) rights established by the legislation as a work, which are considered to be the result of human creative activity, ie mental labor, and are objectively established on the owner of the products. In case of violation of these rights, the perpetrator bears administrative or criminal liability, as well as civil liability.
steps_raw: Copyright is the sum of personal non-property (moral) and property (material) rights established by the legislation as a work, which are considered to be the result of human creative activity, ie mental labor, and are objectively established on the owner of the products. In case of violation of these rights, the perpetrator bears administrative or criminal liability, as well as civil liability.
keywords: author, work, violation, civil liability, criminal liability, moral damages, compensation
